version_description: Here is a new version of the official version of the song "Don't You (Forget About Me)" by Simple Minds. You might as well prefer playing an Asus4 instead of an Asus2 or an Em instead of an E (in the "Hey, hey, hey, hey - Ohhhh..."-Part). Enjoy~.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Hey, hey, hey, hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Ooh...[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Won't you come see about me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I'll be alone, dancing you know it baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Tell me your troubles and doubts[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Given me everything inside and out and[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Love's strange so real in the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Think of the tender things that we were working on[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Slow chains may pull us apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
When our life gets into your heart, baby[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Don't you forget about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Don't, don't, don't, don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Don't you forget about me[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
Will you stand a-bove me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Look my way, never love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Rain keeps falling, rain keeps falling[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Down, down, down[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Will you recognize me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Call my name or walk on by[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Rain keeps falling, rain keeps falling[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Down, down, down, down[/tab]


[Link 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Hey, hey, hey, hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Ohhhh.....[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Don't you try and pretend[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
It's my feeling we'll win in the end[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I won't harm you or touch your defenses[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Vanity, insecurity, a-ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Don't you forget about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I'll be alone, dancing you know it baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Going to take you apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
I'll put us back together at heart, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Don't you forget about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Don't, don't, don't, don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Don't you forget about me[/tab]


[Link 2]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
As you walk on by[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Will you call my name?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
As you walk on by[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Will you call my name?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
When you walk away[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Or will you walk away?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Will you walk on by?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Come on - call my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Will you call my name?[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I say[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
La, la la la la-ah,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
la la la la-ah, la la la,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]
la-la la la-la la...[/tab]
